texto: Isabel wondered if there would ever be a time when she could stop being careful. If there would ever be a time when she could use other kinds of power. She missed it. It felt like part of her had been injected with novocaine and was totally numb. Almost dead" (p.35).
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Melinda Metz: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Isabel wondered if there would ever be a time when she could stop being careful. If there would e…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, melinda-metz, roswell-high pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de roswell-high e teen.
